text.title: Mobile UX Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is a reviewable mobile build / URL / screen inventory reachable?
Are target platforms (iOS / Android / mobile-web) named?

conclusion.verdict: apply: run mobile-audit.sh, measure targets, produce findings per platform; validate artefact.
block: require platforms list before any further work.
defer until build is reachable; static-mockup audit is worse than skipping.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, build reachable, platforms named → run audit per r1-mobile-first; measure targets per r3-touch-target; produce findings and validate.
